steps.title: Use the creativity drawback
steps.content: The passage says the autobiographical label can create drawbacks because creativity and imagination are highly valued in art. Readers who think Mercer merely fictionalized real events may see the novel as less creative.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: B invents critical disagreement. C concerns identifying real-world counterparts, which the passage does not discuss. D assumes Mercer claimed the novel was based on real events. The supported conclusion is that readers may judge the novel less worthy of praise. The answer is A.
